plugins.name: solutions-engineering
plugins.description: Drafts evaluation plans for solutions engineers — business decision, binary success criteria, scope guardrails, stakeholders, validation environment, timeline.

plugins.name: se-leadership
plugins.description: Helps SE managers and enablement leads extract learning from sales-cycle outcomes — starting with reading a Technical Loss's Evaluation Readout against the original Execution Plan to surface planning-stage failures the loss made visible.
